sections.title: Executive Summary
sections.promptHint: 3–4 sentences. State: overall status (Green/Yellow/Red with emoji), the reporting period, the single most important highlight, and the single most important risk or concern.
sections.ragQuery: project status summary highlights risks blockers period

sections.title: Completed This Period
sections.promptHint: Bulleted list of work completed during the reporting period. Each item should name the deliverable or milestone, not just the activity. Use past tense. Pull from ingested context where available.
sections.ragQuery: completed finished delivered done shipped milestones achieved

sections.title: In Progress
sections.promptHint: Bulleted list of work currently underway. For each item: what it is, who owns it, estimated % complete, and expected completion date.
sections.ragQuery: in progress current work ongoing active tasks

sections.title: Upcoming
sections.promptHint: What starts in the next period. Note dependencies — what needs to be ready or decided for this work to begin.
sections.ragQuery: upcoming next steps planned schedule milestones

sections.title: Risks & Blockers
sections.promptHint: The most important section. For each risk or blocker: description, impact if unresolved, mitigation plan, owner, and status (active/mitigated/escalated). If there are no blockers, state that explicitly.
sections.ragQuery: risks blockers issues problems dependencies delays concerns

sections.title: Key Metrics
sections.promptHint: Any tracked project metrics: velocity, budget burn vs. plan, defect count, test coverage, or other KPIs. Use a table. Pull from ingested context where available.
sections.ragQuery: metrics KPIs budget burn velocity performance numbers

sections.title: Next Steps
sections.promptHint: 3–5 specific action items for the next period. Each must have: the action, the owner (name or role), and a due date. Format as a table.
sections.ragQuery: action items next steps owners due dates follow-up
